nasb.text: “When I make the land of Egypt a desolation, And the land is destitute of that which filled it, When I smite all those who live in it, Then they shall know that I am the Lord.

esv.text: When I make the land of Egypt desolate, and when the land is desolate of all that fills it, when I strike down all who dwell in it, then they will know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我使埃及地荒涼，使這地失去它所充滿的，又擊殺其中所有的居民。那時，他們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要使埃及的土地荒凉， 毁灭其中的居民， 那时他们就知道我是耶和华。
